author: jamescvermont-cyber
description: Art guessing game — the bot shows artwork images and players guess the artist. Use $img for more images and $hint for clues.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store any end user data.
install_msg: Load the cog with `[p]load artguesser`, then start a game with `$art`.
name: ArtGuesser
short: Guess the artist from their artwork
